NTC OF MTN TO DEEM REQ.'S FOR ADMISSION ADMITTED DUE TO FAILURE TO SERVE RESPONSES/ALT COMPEL RESPONSE TO DISCOVERY, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF JONES, JOYVA HEARING SET FOR MAR-05-2013 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 302
MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN SUPPORT OF OPPOSITION TO MOTION TO DEEM MATTERS ADMITTED FILED BY DEFENDANT CIVIC CENTER HOTEL LLC.

DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF JOYVA JONES' NOTICE OF MOTION TO DEEM REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION ADMITTED DUE TO FAILURE TO SERVE RESPONSES/ALT COMPEL RESPONSE TO DISCOVERY IS CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO MARCH 13, 2013 TO GIVE THE MOVING PARTY THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. THE MOVING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF ITS MOVING AND REPLY PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN MARCH 5, 2013 AT 4:00 PM OR THE MOTION WILL BE DENIED. THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPPOSITION PAPERS. BRAD KAPLAN, JUDGE PRO-TEM, JACQUELINE ALAMEDA, CLERK, NOT REPORTED.

DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF JOYVA JONES' MOTION TO DEEM REQUEST'S FOR ADMISSION ADMITTED DUE TO FAILURE TO SERVE RESPONSES/ALT COMPEL RESPONSE TO DISCOVERY IS DENIED. MOTION WAS CONTINUED FROM 3/5/13 FOR MOVING PARTY TO PROVIDE COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS IN ACCORDANCE WITH SAN FRANCISCO LOCAL RULE 2.6B, AND HAS FAILED TO DO SO. ORDER SIGNED WITH THE MOVING PAPERS. PRO TEM JUDGE: KATHERINE HUIBONHOA, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT, NOT REPORTED. =(302/JPT)
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-31-2013 Vacated

Plaintiff Joyva Jones Ntc Of Mtn To Deem Request'S For Admission Admitted Due To Failure To Serve Responses/Alt Compel Response To Discovery
Off Calendar Mar-13-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted.
Plaintiff Joyva Jones' Motion To Deem Request's For Admission Admitted Due To Failure To Serve Responses/Alt Compel Response To Discovery is Denied. Motion was continued from 3/5/13 for moving party to provide courtesy copies of the moving papers in accordance with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B, and has failed to do so. ORDER SIGNED WITH THE MOVING PAPERS. Pro Tem Judge: Katherine Huibonhoa, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, Not reported.
=(302/JPT)

Ntc Of Mtn To Deem Req.'S For Admission Admitted Due To Failure To Serve Responses/Alt Compel Response To Discovery
Off Calendar Mar-05-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING:

PLAINTIFF JOYVA JONES' Notice Of Motion To Deem Requests For Admission Admitted Due To Failure To Serve Responses/Alt Compel Response To Discovery is continued on the court's own motion to March 13, 2013 to give the moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. The moving party must deliver courtesy copies of its moving and reply papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than March 5, 2013 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. The court has courtesy copies of the opposition papers. Brad Kaplan, Judge Pro-Tem, Jacqueline Alameda, Clerk, Not Reported. =(302/JPT)
